principle: Build packets in an order that proves generation lift, improvement lift, discrepancy discovery, verification boundaries, and Gov trust discipline without mixing claims.

packet_queue.question: Can Holo produce a better institutional algorithmic-execution report than solo frontier or mini models under identical source context?
packet_queue.next_action: Run fresh current-lock mini route, analyze, and roll up mean lift.

packet_queue.question: Given an already strong finance report, can Holo find hidden weaknesses and produce a better version than solo improvement?
Can Holo find material discrepancies, missing assumptions, unsupported claims, or uncoded risks in an already trusted execution policy/report?
Could Holo identify a real finance failure mode from pre-event evidence before the outcome was known?
Can Holo preserve contradictions and name impossible requirements instead of smoothing them into a plausible but wrong answer?
Can Holo produce a safer synthetic diagnostic reasoning packet than solos by preserving uncertainty, red flags, and cannot-miss conditions?
packet_queue.boundary: Synthetic cases only; no real patient data; no medical advice; no diagnosis; no treatment plan.

packet_queue.question: Can Holo produce stronger adversarial legal reasoning, bench memos, or synthetic rulings than solo models under the same fact and authority pack?
Could Holo identify an incident-response failure mode from pre-incident or early-incident information before a public postmortem made it obvious?
Can cheaper mini HoloAgents produce a measurably better guest or customer experience plan than solo minis?
Can mini HoloAgents help students produce better plans, project proposals, study maps, or decision packets than solo mini models?

suggested_next_order: run current-lock finance mini route A
inspect lift rollup and token ratio
choose next new domain after finance improvement/discrepancy evidence
